seo.title: Building Content Generation with DSPy + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build content generation with DSPy + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: DSPy enables programmatic LLM content generation through composable, optimizable modules that go beyond manual prompting. For content creation pipelines enforcing brand voice, factual accuracy, and editorial standards, DSPy shines—but risks like prompt overfitting and chain-of-thought hallucinations can produce polished but flawed output. Vex guardrails wrap DSPy module calls to verify brand consistency, facts, originality, tone, and SEO compliance at inference time.

architectureOverview.heading: Content Generation Architecture with DSPy
architectureOverview.description:
DSPy builds content pipelines as signature-based modules (e.g., GenerateContent, CheckFacts) composed into programs like ChainOfThought or custom MultiChainOfThought. A typical architecture starts with a TopicAnalyzer module extracting key themes, feeds into a BrandVoiceGenerator producing draft content, then pipes through FactChecker and ToneEnforcer modules. Optimization via teleprompters tunes these modules against few-shot examples while Vex verifies outputs against domain-specific assertions.

The pipeline serializes module calls with basic() or forward() invocations, enabling precise Vex integration points. DSPy's LM caching and metric compilation ensure efficient compilation, but without runtime verification, optimized modules can drift into subtle violations like off-brand phrasing or unchecked facts.
architectureOverview.diagram:
TopicAnalyzer --> BrandVoiceGenerator --> FactChecker -->
                     ToneEnforcer --> SEOOptimizer
                           |
                       Vex.verify()
                           |
                     Final Content

risks.name: Optimized prompts overfitting to training examples
risks.description: DSPy teleprompters create prompts tightly coupled to training data, generating brand-inconsistent content for novel topics
risks.mitigation: Vex brand consistency checks at inference time regardless of prompt optimization

risks.name: Chain-of-thought reasoning producing plausible but wrong logic
risks.description: CoT modules generate convincing reasoning chains that fabricate facts while sounding authoritative
risks.mitigation: Vex fact-checking assertions validate claims against external sources

risks.name: Assertion violations not caught at inference time
risks.description: DSPy optimization focuses on training metrics, missing runtime violations of tone/SEO guidelines
risks.mitigation: Wrap forward() calls with vex.verify() using production assertions

risks.name: Module composition creating unexpected output distributions
risks.description: Chained modules amplify subtle biases, producing off-tone or plagiarized content
risks.mitigation: Vex originality and tone verification at each module boundary

implementation.title: Basic DSPy Content Generation Signature
implementation.description: Define DSPy signatures for brand-aligned content generation with structured input/output fields
implementation.code:
import dspy

class GenerateBrandContent(dspy.Signature):
    '''Generate engaging content matching brand voice.'''
    topic = dspy.InputField()
    brand_guidelines = dspy.InputField(desc='Key brand voice characteristics')
    content = dspy.OutputField()

class FactCheckContent(dspy.Signature):
    '''Verify factual accuracy of generated content.'''
    content = dspy.InputField()
    facts_verified = dspy.OutputField()
    issues = dspy.OutputField(desc='Any factual problems found')

content_gen = GenerateBrandContent()
result = content_gen(topic='AI ethics', brand_guidelines='professional, optimistic, authoritative')

implementation.title: DSPy Program with ChainOfThought
implementation.description: Compose modules into optimizable programs using DSPy's ChainOfThought pattern

implementation.title: DSPy Teleprompter Optimization
implementation.description: Optimize the pipeline using few-shot examples with DSPy's BootstrapFewShot optimizer
implementation.code:
from dspy.teleprompt import BootstrapFewShot

trainset = [
    dspy.Example(topic='climate change', brand_guidelines='hopeful, actionable').with_outputs('content'),
    # ... more examples
]

telprompt = BootstrapFewShot(metric=dspy.evaluate.answer_exact_match)
optimized_pipeline = telprompt.compile(pipeline, trainset=trainset)

optimized_result = optimized_pipeline(topic='sustainable energy', brand_guidelines='optimistic, practical')

implementation.title: Production DSPy Module with Caching
implementation.description: Deploy optimized modules with LM caching for production content generation
implementation.code:
import dspy

dspy.settings.configure(lm=dspy.LM('openai/gpt-4o'), cache=True)

# Production deployment
class ProductionContentGen(dspy.Module):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.generate = dspy.ChainOfThought(GenerateBrandContent)
        self.finalize = dspy.ChainOfThought(FactCheckContent)
    
    def forward(self, topic, brand_guidelines):
        pred = self.generate(topic=topic, brand_guidelines=brand_guidelines)
        final = self.finalize(content=pred.content)
        return {'content': pred.content, 'verified': final.facts_verified == 'yes'}

prod_gen = ProductionContentGen()
content = prod_gen(topic='blockchain adoption', brand_guidelines='innovative, trustworthy')

vexIntegration.title: Wrap DSPy forward() with Vex Brand Verification
vexIntegration.description: Integrate Vex to verify brand consistency immediately after DSPy module execution
vexIntegration.code:
import vex

from vex_sdk import Verifier

# Initialize Vex verifier
verifier = Verifier(api_key='your-vex-api-key')

class VexGuardedContentGen(dspy.Module):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.generate = dspy.ChainOfThought(GenerateBrandContent)
    
    def forward(self, topic, brand_guidelines):
        # Generate content with DSPy
        pred = self.generate(topic=topic, brand_guidelines=brand_guidelines)
        
        # Vex verification
        verification = verifier.verify(
            pred.content,
            assertions={
                'brand_consistency': {
                    'type': 'brand_voice',
                    'brand_profile': 'professional, optimistic, authoritative',
                    'min_score': 0.9
                }
            }
        )
        
        pred.verified_brand = verification.passed
        pred.vex_score = verification.score
        return pred

safe_gen = VexGuardedContentGen()
result = safe_gen(topic='AI regulation', brand_guidelines='balanced, insightful')

vexIntegration.title: Multi-Assertion Vex Pipeline Verification
vexIntegration.description: Verify factual accuracy, tone, and SEO compliance across the full DSPy pipeline

vexIntegration.title: Vex Monitoring for DSPy Production Deployment
vexIntegration.description: Add continuous monitoring and alerting for DSPy content pipelines in production
vexIntegration.code:
import vex
from vex_sdk.monitoring import PipelineMonitor

class MonitoredDSPyPipeline(dspy.Module):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.content_gen = ProductionContentGen()
        self.monitor = PipelineMonitor(
            project_id='content-gen-dspy',
            assertions=['brand_consistency', 'factual_accuracy', 'seo_compliance']
        )
    
    def forward(self, topic, brand_guidelines):
        result = self.content_gen(topic=topic, brand_guidelines=brand_guidelines)
        
        # Log to Vex monitoring
        self.monitor.log_inference(
            input={'topic': topic, 'guidelines': brand_guidelines},
            output=result['content'],
            metadata={'module': 'dspy-content-gen', 'version': 'v1.2'}
        )
        
        # Verify and alert
        verification = verifier.verify(result['content'])
        self.monitor.record_verification(verification)
        
        if not verification.passed:
            self.monitor.alert(f'Content verification failed: {verification.score}')
        
        return result

monitored_pipeline = MonitoredDSPyPipeline()

cta.heading: Secure Your DSPy Content Generation
cta.description: Add Vex verification to your DSPy pipelines today with `pip install vex-sdk` and start catching brand violations before they publish.
